pi_items.source: Task description (line 5) and setup_librecad.sh (line 60) confirm directory creation at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD; consistent with all other LibreCAD tasks in the environment
AutoCAD Color Index (ACI) standard: color 7 = WHITE. Verified through ezdxf documentation and task description which explicitly states 'Color: White/7'
AutoCAD Color Index (ACI) standard: color 4 = CYAN. Verified through ezdxf documentation and task description which explicitly states 'Color: Cyan/4'
Task description explicitly states: 'draw a rectangle from (0,0) to (300,250)'. Width=300, Height=250 (in drawing units)
Task description explicitly states: 'Each slot consists of two semicircles (Radius 7mm)'. Value is 7 millimeters

Task description explicitly states: 'center-to-center distance is 70mm'. Verified geometrically: overall slot length = radius(7) + center-to-center(70) + radius(7) = 84mm, which matches the stated 'overall length of each slot is 84mm'

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been verified. The task specifies creating a mechanical base plate drawing in LibreCAD with a white rectangle (300x250 units) on the PLATE layer and four cyan obround slots on the SLOTS layer. Each slot consists of two semicircles with 7mm radius positioned at center-to-center distances of 70mm, resulting in an overall slot length of 84mm. The output file should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/motor_base_plate.dxf. Color codes 7 (white) and 4 (cyan) are standard AutoCAD Color Index values. All slot positions and dimensions are internally consistent and remain within the plate bounds.
